SEARCH
Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.persistence.converters

Class EntityNotFoundExceptionReportConverter

java.lang.Object
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.persistence.converters.EntityNotFoundExceptionReportConverter
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter<EntityNotFoundException,ErrorReport>
@Component public class EntityNotFoundExceptionReportConverter extends Object implements org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter<EntityNotFoundException,ErrorReport>
Converts an EntityNotFoundException into an ErrorReport representation.

This class is a Spring Component and implements the Converter interface, allowing it to transform EntityNotFoundException instances into structured error reports for better communication or logging of errors. Typically used in scenarios where an entity cannot be found in the system based on the provided query.

The conversion logic creates a MessageErrorReport that includes: - An HTTP status code of HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND. - An error message formatted using the template: "Entity {type=%s} not found for {query=%s}".

The message includes the type of the entity and the query that was used in the search, which are extracted from the source EntityNotFoundException. If the query is null, it is represented as the string "null".

This class facilitates structured error reporting, which is particularly useful in REST APIs to map technical exceptions to standardized error responses.

    MESSAGE
    A message template used to describe a scenario where an entity cannot be found in the system based on the given query.

  • Field Details

    • MESSAGE

      public static final String MESSAGE
      A message template used to describe a scenario where an entity cannot be found in the system based on the given query.

      The message format includes placeholders for the type of the entity and the query used to locate it: "Entity {type=%s} not found for {query=%s}".

      This template is primarily utilized in the context of converting EntityNotFoundException into a structured MessageErrorReport. It enables detailed, user-friendly error messages for API responses or logging, helping to identify the missing entity and the query that was used during the search.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • convert

      public MessageErrorReport convert(@NotNull @NotNull EntityNotFoundException source)
      Converts an EntityNotFoundException to a MessageErrorReport containing the corresponding HTTP status and error message details.
      Specified by:
      convert in interface org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter<EntityNotFoundException,ErrorReport>
      Parameters:
      source - the EntityNotFoundException instance to convert
      Returns:
      a MessageErrorReport with the status set to HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND and a formatted error message containing the entity type and query
